description_long: This is a large, modern airplane with a distinctive high-wing configuration and a straight, elongated fuselage. The wings are mounted high on the body and feature multiple engines, each housed in a nacelle beneath the wings. The tail section is equipped with a prominent T-tail, where the horizontal stabilizer is mounted atop the vertical fin. The airplane's surface is primarily smooth and metallic, with subtle blue accent lines running along the fuselage and wings. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage, and the landing gear is not visibly extended in these views.
description: A large, high-wing airplane with multiple underwing engines, a T-tail, and a smooth metallic finish accented by blue lines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted wings, multiple underwing engines, and the prominent T-tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide wingspan, engine arrangement, and the narrow fuselage profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the high-wing design, engine nacelles, and the T-tail structure.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full wingspan, engine placement, and the T-tail's horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with multiple underwing engine nacelles and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Six jet engines mounted under the wings in nacelles.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer mounted at the top.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Not visibly extended; configuration not clearly shown.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit at the front of the fuselage.
